channel.title: MCP Radar — new MCP servers
channel.description: New and trending Model Context Protocol servers, auto-discovered from GitHub daily.

item.title: JesusRS1/stock-trade-finance-api
item.description: Stock Trade MCP server in Tiingo with stock prices, news, forex, and fundamentals programmatically via the MCP — ⭐91, TypeScript

item.title: tonnode/mcp
item.description: TON MCP server for Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, Codex and any MCP client — liteserver queries over native ADNL: balances, account state, transaction history, get-methods. Private & archive endpoints suppo — ⭐66, TypeScript

item.title: 0xmiki/figmaboy
item.description: A local-first desktop interface design tool with a native MCP server for Codex. — ⭐9, Svelte

item.title: vynazevedo/ARKHE
item.description: Portal de arquitetura auto-hospedado + linguagem executável: catálogo verificado, landscape C4 com drill-in, governança (fitness functions e SLO por caminho crítico) e editor no browser. Binário Go ún — ⭐4, Go

item.title: MiiKiyoshi/tex-mcp-web
item.description: Agentic-first PDF review for LaTeX papers: live web viewer + comment queue + MCP server for Claude Code — ⭐4, Python

item.title: suren-kk/armenian-national-library-mcp
item.description: Unofficial MCP server for discovering and querying Armenian National Library archives and data — ⭐3, TypeScript

item.title: davidnichols-ops/trustcard
item.description: The "npm audit" for MCP servers — a public trust card for every Model Context Protocol server. — ⭐3, JavaScript

item.title: syouro/InkPaw
item.description: An MCP server and deterministic DOCX toolkit for AI agents—create, edit, validate, and render reliable Word documents with a local agent playground. — ⭐3, JavaScript

item.title: alphaparkinc/genpark-loomal-mcp-billing-gateway-skill
item.description: Loomal-like billing gateway for MCP servers usage — ⭐3, Python

item.title: Alex663028/pulse-agent
item.description: Pulse — Hermes-style self-improving AI agent. Reliability-first rebuild with evaluated skill self-evolution, multi-agent team orchestration, dialectic user modeling, and fully self-hosted default stac — ⭐3, Python

item.title: valtors/observer
item.description: Transparent MCP proxy for agent observability. Logs every tool call, exposes trace history, reduces token overhead. — ⭐3, Go

item.title: FROWNINGdev/django-orm-lens
item.description: Live sidebar, ER diagrams, CLI, and MCP server for Django models. VS Code + PyPI + MCP Registry + Glama. Zero-dep parser, no DB required. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: yagyeshVyas/VibeGuard
item.description: Free security & privacy scanner for AI-coded apps. 699 rules, 76 MCP tools, 13-layer defense, zero-trust sandbox, AI firewall. Runs locally, never sends data anywhere. Scan your AI-generated app for l — ⭐3, JavaScript

item.title: ArtemBaranov/rkmatrix-mcp-server
item.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server built with FastMCP to provide AI models with structured technical data about rootkit techniques and families. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: flaviomartil/token-skein
item.description: Token-efficiency proxy for Codex/OpenAI Responses API: recoverable storage, MCP server, opt-in visual compaction, effort routing — ⭐3, TypeScript

item.title: sanghun0724/configdeck
item.description: Native macOS SwiftUI dashboard for inspecting your ~/.claude config — skills, agents, settings, hooks, MCP servers, slash commands. — ⭐3, Swift

item.title: jimmyrivas/bifrost
item.description: Modern connection manager for Linux — spiritual successor to Ásbrú Connection Manager. SSH, clusters, tunnels, automation, MCP server for AI agents. — ⭐3, TypeScript

item.title: upvoteclub/upvote-club-mcp-mcpb
item.description: Claude Desktop .mcpb bundle for Upvote.club. Part of upvoteclub/upvote-club-mcp-* family — see core repo for all packages. — ⭐44, JavaScript

item.title: upvoteclub/upvote-club-mcp-remote
item.description: Streamable HTTP remote MCP for Upvote.club. Part of upvoteclub/upvote-club-mcp-* family — see core repo for all packages. — ⭐43, JavaScript

item.title: upvoteclub/upvote-club-mcp-apps
item.description: MCP Apps with task progress UI for Upvote.club. Part of upvoteclub/upvote-club-mcp-* family — see core repo for all packages. — ⭐43, JavaScript

item.title: illiahaidar/mcptrustchecker
item.description: MCP security scanner — offline, deterministic A–F Trust Score for Model Context Protocol servers. Detects tool poisoning, prompt injection & toxic flows. — ⭐39, TypeScript

item.title: upvoteclub/upvote-club-mcp-local
item.description: Self-serve stdio MCP for Upvote.club. Part of upvoteclub/upvote-club-mcp-* family — see core repo for all packages. — ⭐32, JavaScript

item.title: upvoteclub/upvote-club-mcp-core
item.description: Shared MCP server for Upvote.club Public API. Hub repo — links to local, mcpb, remote, apps packages. — ⭐18, JavaScript

item.title: 12122J/mcpvet
item.description: MCP security scanner — vet a Model Context Protocol server before you add it to Claude Code, Cursor, or Windsurf. Grades it A–F, catching credential theft, tool-poisoning, and install-script payloads — ⭐10, JavaScript

item.title: 8NobleTruths/sabba
item.description: SABBA - Security Templates CLI & MCP Server for coding agents that prove every finding by running it — ⭐9, Python

item.title: DukeDeSouth/tokendiet-mcp
item.description: Local MCP server that compresses agent context payloads before they enter the model — with honest BPE counts and safety rollback. — ⭐6, TypeScript

item.title: agentIgris/AgentFund
item.description: Fundraising infrastructure for AI agents on Solana — x402 payments, milestone escrow, on-chain reputation. REST + WebSocket + MCP + ACP. — ⭐5, TypeScript

item.title: hbhqq9/bde-score
item.description: 🏆 Open-source multi-factor stock scoring API (0-100) | US/HK/A-Share 74 stocks | Zero signup | shields.io badges | GitHub Action | EU AI Act compliant — ⭐5, Python

item.title: howshannon/trust-issues
item.description: Adversarial security review for AI skills, repos, MCP servers, and packages before you install them. A read-only scanner plus a five-persona reasoning pass, ending in a GO / GO WITH MITIGATIONS / NO-G — ⭐4, Shell

item.title: Cocabadger/tick-mcp
item.description: An MCP time server that keeps your AI honest about time. Zero-dependency clock + drift guard for Claude Desktop, Claude Code, and claude.ai — local, remote, and hook flavors. — ⭐4, Python
